creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
Suggested fix:


--- Makefile.orig	Mon May 14 23:46:01 2001
+++ Makefile	Mon May 14 23:46:50 2001
@@ -57,8 +57,8 @@
 		${WRKSRC}/cvsweb.cgi
 	${PERL} -i -pe "\
 		s;!!PREFIX!!;${PREFIX};g; \
-		s;!!CVSROOT!!;${CVSROOT};g; \
-		s;!!TITLE!!;${TITLE};g;" \
+		s'!!CVSROOT!!'${CVSROOT}'g; \
+		s'!!TITLE!!'${TITLE}'g;" \
 		${WRKSRC}/cvsweb.conf
 
 do-install:

Cheers,
-Anton.
